texto: There were more recent markings as well-initials scratched over the pictographs, some with dates. people were always wanting to announce their existence to the world in a way that would surpass the ages, creating some sort of immortality. For all Karigan knew, the more ancient carvings were just another incarnation of such an urge.
explicacao: Citação de Kristen Britain sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There were more recent markings as well-initials scratched over the pictographs, some with dates.…” articula reflexao, truth-of-life, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: There were more recent markings as well-initials scratched over the pictographs, some with dates. people were always wanting to announce their existence to the world in a way that would surpass the ages, creating some sort of immortality. For all Karigan knew, the more ancient carvings were just another incarnation of such an urge.

texto: Do whatever you must, Karigan," he told her, his voice so quiet it would not carry, "to come back. You must come back. To me." ~King Zachary
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kristen Britain sobre temas ligados a amor. A afirmação “Do whatever you must, Karigan," he told her, his voice so quiet it would not carry, "to come back…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, king, love, útil em momentos de love e romance.
